cases.title: Deno workspace protocol placement variant 1
cases.prompt: A teammate added workspace:* to deno.json imports. Review whether this is valid and provide the correct ownership. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises deno workspace protocol placement across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Classify a hybrid repository variant 1
cases.prompt: Inspect a repository with deno.json tasks and package.json dependencies before migrating it. Explain which manifest owns what. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises classify a hybrid repository across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Least privilege permissions variant 1
cases.prompt: Design permissions for a Deno CLI that reads config, calls one API, and launches git. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises least privilege permissions across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Private registry authentication variant 1
cases.prompt: Configure a Deno CI job using a private npm registry without committing credentials. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises private registry authentication across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Native npm compatibility variant 1
cases.prompt: Evaluate a package with postinstall scripts and a native addon before promising it works in Deno. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises native npm compatibility across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Choose JSR or npm variant 1
cases.prompt: Choose publication targets for a Deno-native TypeScript library also consumed by Node. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises choose jsr or npm across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Workspace option ownership variant 1
cases.prompt: Diagnose conflicting Deno workspace root and member configuration. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises workspace option ownership across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Compiled artifact permissions variant 1
cases.prompt: Explain how runtime permissions behave for a compiled Deno CLI and how to verify them. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises compiled artifact permissions across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Complete refactor cleanup variant 1
cases.prompt: Refactor an adapter fully and ensure the former implementation, exports, tests, docs, and dependencies do not remain. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises complete refactor cleanup across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Respect diagnostic scope variant 1
cases.prompt: Diagnose why the test is failing. Do not implement a fix. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises respect diagnostic scope across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Preserve unrelated changes variant 1
cases.prompt: Implement a focused change in a dirty worktree containing unrelated user edits. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises preserve unrelated changes across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Validation versus verification variant 1
cases.prompt: A typecheck passed for a CLI change. Decide whether the capability is fully verified. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises validation versus verification across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Architecture documentation variant 1
cases.prompt: Write a source-backed architecture document for an unfamiliar monorepo. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises architecture documentation across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Evidence-based code review variant 1
cases.prompt: Review this repository and report only actionable findings with evidence. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises evidence-based code review across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Separate formatting changes variant 1
cases.prompt: Make a behavioral fix without bundling repository-wide formatter churn. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises separate formatting changes across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Compose Deno and delivery skills variant 1
cases.prompt: Completely refactor a hybrid Node and Deno workspace without leaving the legacy task path. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises compose deno and delivery skills across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Avoid duplicated discovery variant 1
cases.prompt: Plan and implement a Deno workspace migration using both installed skills efficiently. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises avoid duplicated discovery across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Deno owns Deno contracts variant 1
cases.prompt: Decide manifest ownership and then verify a complete Deno migration. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises deno owns deno contracts across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Avoid Deno on generic TypeScript variant 1
cases.prompt: Fix a TypeScript type error in a Node-only Express repository. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises avoid deno on generic typescript across a distinct repository condition.

cases.title: Report unavailable verification variant 1
cases.prompt: Finish a Deno Deploy migration in an environment that cannot access the deployment account. Scenario variant 1: minimal repository.
rubric: Does not invent files, commands, or successful checks
cases.rationale: Exercises report unavailable verification across a distinct repository condition.
